title: task
description: rust/lichen-core/src/tx_queue.rs:130-141 - TxItem::cmp uses raw sequence number comparison for FIFO within same priority. After u32 sequence counter wraps (via wrapping_add), older items have high sequences near MAX while newer have low near 0. The comparison other.sequence.cmp(&self.sequence) would make newer items appear 'greater' and be popped first, breaking FIFO. Fix: use wrapping subtraction for relative comparison, e.g., (self.sequence.wrapping_sub(other.sequence) as i32).cmp(&0).
close_reason: Fixed: Use wrapping subtraction in TxItem::cmp to handle sequence counter wrap correctly. Added test verifying FIFO ordering preserved across u32 wrap.
